zh.Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭爾南特維其
zh.lifeSummary: 當SIR KNIGHT John De Hyde於1307年出生在英國爾諾波利時，他的父親Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury36歲，母親Margaret Davenport32歲。他和Margaret Davenport至少有2個兒子。他去世於1364年在他的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰爾南特維其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当SIR KNIGHT John De Hyde于1307年出生在英国爾諾波利时，他的父亲Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury36岁，母亲Margaret Davenport32岁。他和Margaret Davenport至少有2个儿子。他去世于1364年在他的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hyde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of various places so called in Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Hampshire, and Middlesex. They were named with Old English hīd ‘hide (of land)’, a variable measure of land, differing from place to place and time to time, and seems to have been originally fixed as the amount necessary to support one (extended) family (Old English hīgan, hīwan ‘household’). The surname may also be topographic for someone living on (and farming) a hide of land. The Hyde family has been in Leinster, Ireland, since the early 13th century and one family has been established in the county of Cork since the 16th century. The name was Gaelicized as both Dalaithíd and de hÍde. Compare Hyder .

variants.name: Dollarhide
meanings: Irish: possibly an altered form of de la Hyde (see Hyde ), which was a prominent surname in Leinster from medieval times onward. Compare Dollahite .

History: Francis Dollahide, born c. 1650–60 in County Dublin, Ireland, was the ancestor of Americans with the surname Dollahide, Dollahite, and Dollarhide. In 1680 he was transported to MD for some youthful misdemeanor. He appears to have been an educated man and rose to be an important landowner and politician, serving in the Lower House of the MD legislature as an elected representative for Baltimore County from c. 1705 to 1721.

variants.name: Hyder
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): status name or topographic name for one who lived on or possessed a hide of land, from Middle English hide + the locative suffix -er. This is a characteristically southeastern English name, synonymous with Middle English atte hide elsewhere (see Hyde ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When SIR KNIGHT John De Hyde was born in 1307, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury, was 36 and his mother, Margaret Davenport, was 32. He had at least 2 sons with Margaret Davenport. He died in 1364, in his hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque SIR KNIGHT John De Hyde est né en 1307, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Davenport, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Margaret Davenport. Il est décédé en 1364, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als SIR KNIGHT John De Hyde 1307 in Norbury, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury 36 und seine Mutter Margaret Davenport 32. Er hatte mit Margaret Davenport mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1364 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando SIR KNIGHT John De Hyde è nato il nel 1307 nel Norbury, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Davenport, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Margaret Davenport. Morì nel 1364, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: SIR KNIGHT John De Hydeが1307年にイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norburyは36歳，母Margaret Davenportは32歳であった。彼はMargaret Davenportとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1364年に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: SIR KNIGHT John De Hyde(이)가 1307년 영국 체실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Davenport(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Margaret Davenport(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1364년 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando SIR KNIGHT John De Hyde nasceu em 1307, em Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Davenport, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Margaret Davenport. Ele faleceu em 1364, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда SIR KNIGHT John De Hyde родился в 1307 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Davenport, 32. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Margaret Davenport. Он умер в 1364 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando SIR KNIGHT John De Hyde nació en 1307, en Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret Davenport, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Margaret Davenport. Murió en 1364, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
